title: Potion of Infestation Backport
description: Backport of the Potion of Infestation for Minecraft versions 1.20 - 1.20.6
body:
# Potion of Infestation Backport
Potion of Infestation Backport brings the Infested effect from Minecraft 1.21 to Fabric, Forge and NeoForge 1.20 - 1.20.6.

Entities affected by the Infested effect have a chance to spawn silverfish when they take damage.

## Features
- Backports the Infested effect and the Potion of Infestation from Minecraft 1.21
- Entities with the effect have a configurable chance to spawn silverfish when damaged
- Spawns 1–3 silverfish by default, fully configurable
- Works with players, vanilla mobs, and modded mobs
- Compatible with backported mobs such as armadillos

## Issues & Feedback
If you find any issues, report them on our [Github issues page](https://github.com/JustErikSK/PotionOfInfestationBackport-Mod/issues) for this mod.

![website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f6907e86aad55d3518d34c37a13e3addb723228_0.webp)
